# Asset Contract (Generated)

Contract: `ASSET-CONTRACT-001`
Domain: `asset`
Version: `2026-03-21`

Rules: 4

| Rule ID | Level | Title | Statement |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| R-ASSET-001 | must | creator-owned-asset-model | Realm assets are creator-owned publishable works with stable identity, visibility, lifecycle, and release semantics. |
| R-ASSET-002 | must | asset-not-core-archive | Asset storage is distinct from world truth, world history, and agent memory; app-private archives must not masquerade as realm assets. |
| R-ASSET-003 | must | explicit-idempotent-asset-mutation | Asset mutations are explicit, idempotent, and auditable. |
| R-ASSET-004 | must | app-consume-boundary-safe | Apps may reference assets but cannot usurp asset ownership or release truth. |

Entities: 3

| Entity | Prisma Model | Required Fields | JSON Fields |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| RealmAsset | Asset | id, creatorId, assetType, visibility, status | metadata |
| NovelAsset | Asset | id, creatorId, assetType | structure, metadata |
| AssetReleaseEvent | AssetReleaseEvent | id, assetId, releaseType, publishedAt | payload |

Required operations: 4
- GET /api/assets
- POST /api/assets
- GET /api/assets/{assetId}
- PATCH /api/assets/{assetId}

Secondary operations: 2
- POST /api/assets/{assetId}/publish
- POST /api/assets/{assetId}/archive
